name: Routing - Mid-Call Path Switch
description: Caller starts a new claim then switches to existing-claim status.
entryAgent: TBD - set after agents are built
initialMessage: I need to start a warranty claim for my battery.
expectedOutcome: Agent begins Path 1, then on the switch cleanly moves to Path 2: abandoned new-claim context does not leak; claim number is collected; warm transfer executes.
